summary: Document Expiry and Draft Collaboration features fully tested (iteration_30). Backend: 15/15 tests PASS (100%). All expiry CRUD endpoints working: set/update/get/remove expiry date, expiry dashboard, status calculation (expired/critical/warning/approaching/active). Frontend: Dashboard shows ExpiryWidget with document list, ExpiryBadge on request cards, SetExpiryButton with date picker form, NotificationBell shows expiry notifications. SharedDraftViewer collaboration: PresenceBar shows 'Live' with WebSocket connected, editable fields working.

issues: Note: Frontend route is /drafts/shared/:shareToken not /shared-draft/:shareToken - main agent may want to verify this is intended

critical_code_review_comments: Good: Expiry status calculation correctly handles all thresholds (30/7/1/0 days)
Good: Dashboard endpoint sorts documents by urgency (expired first)
Good: SetExpiryButton resets notification flags when expiry changes
Good: WebSocket collaboration shows 'Live' indicator when connected
Good: PresenceBar shows 'Only you here' when single user viewing
Good: All data-testid attributes present for UI testing
Good: ExpiryWidget shows summary pills (expired/critical/warning/approaching counts)
Minor: Draft collaboration WebSocket endpoint requires auth message first (documented)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all expiry UI elements and collaboration features working

seed_data_creation: Used existing notarization requests and drafts. Expiry dates set/removed during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document Expiry feature: Routes at /api/expiry/requests/{id} (PUT/GET/DELETE) and /api/expiry/dashboard. ExpiryWidget, ExpiryBadge, SetExpiryButton components in Dashboard.jsx. Draft Collaboration: WebSocket at /api/ws/draft/{draft_id}, SharedDraftViewer at /drafts/shared/:shareToken (requires login). Presence bar shows when connected. Known shared draft tokens: xfXpoL6DtN6vmh5QenlcxBfaxMrOdXFd (read-only), jrlQhOUaoTMTreRPqtCrgm808ycCcLsP (editable).

backend_expiry_api.GET /api/expiry/requests/{id}: Get expiry status with days_remaining - PASS
backend_expiry_api.GET /api/expiry/dashboard: All docs with expiry sorted by urgency - PASS

frontend_expiry_ui.expiry-widget: Document Expiry Tracker card on dashboard - VISIBLE
frontend_expiry_ui.expiry-urgent-count: Shows urgent count when docs expiring - TESTED
frontend_expiry_ui.expiry-badge-{id}: Badge on request cards showing days left - FOUND (1 badge)
frontend_expiry_ui.set-expiry-btn-{id}: Button to set/edit expiry - FOUND (5 buttons)
frontend_expiry_ui.expiry-form-{id}: Date picker form opens on button click - WORKING

frontend_collaboration_ui.shared-draft-banner: Shows sharer email and edit permissions - WORKING
frontend_collaboration_ui.presence-bar: Shows 'Live' with green dot and user count - WORKING

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked - all endpoints are fully functional
